headline: RTX Board of Directors Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: RTX (NYSE: RTX) announced today that its board of directors declared a dividend of 73 cents per outstanding share of RTX common stock, which represents an increase of 7.4 percent over the prior quarter's dividend amount. The dividend will be payable on June 11, 2026 to shareowners of record at the close of business on May 22, 2026.

headline: RTX Golden Dome Role Puts Valuation And Defense Exposure In Focus
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) has been named a global innovation leader, underscoring its role in advanced aerospace and defense technologies. The company has been selected by the U.S. Space Force to help develop space based missile interceptor prototypes for President Trump’s Golden Dome missile shield program. This work forms part of a multi billion dollar missile defense initiative that positions RTX among a small group of key contractors. For investors watching defense and space, this combination of...
